news.t: Capital Group Launches New U.S. Growth and U.S. Value Equity ETFs For Model Portfolio Builders, and First High Yield Bond ETF

holdings.infoBox: CGGG is an equity ETF with a total of 44 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 11.37%, Alphabet at 8.30%, Broadcom at 8.06%, Microsoft at 7.21%, and Meta Platforms at 5.34%.

overview.description: The Capital Group U.S. Large Growth ETF (CGGG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is actively managed, seeking capital appreciation through investments in US equities. It specifically targets large-cap growth companies with durable competitive advantages. CGGG was launched on Jun 24, 2025 and is issued by Capital Group.

data.title: Capital Group Launches New U.S. Growth and U.S. Value Equity ETFs For Model Portfolio Builders, and First High Yield Bond ETF
data.text: The $66B ETF manager has grown its total suite of ETFs to 25 in the U.S., with registered investment advisors comprising a fifth of its overall ETF business LOS ANGELES , June 26, 2025 /PRNewswire/ --...
